data.title: RED: Write test for anti-pattern prompt templates
data.description:
Write tests/scripts/test-fix-bug-anti-pattern-prompts.sh with six subtests:
- test_scan_prompt_exists: test -f prompts/anti-pattern-scan.md
- test_scan_prompt_has_output_format: grep for "Output Format" or "Candidate"
- test_scan_prompt_has_scope_exclusions: grep for "exclude" or "scope"
- test_fix_batch_prompt_exists: test -f prompts/anti-pattern-fix-batch.md
- test_fix_batch_prompt_has_red_test: grep for "RED test" or "failing test"
- test_fix_batch_prompt_has_completion_record: grep for "completion record" or "batch.*status"

All must FAIL (RED) because neither prompt file exists yet.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash -n tests/scripts/test-fix-bug-anti-pattern-prompts.sh exits 0
  Verify: bash -n tests/scripts/test-fix-bug-anti-pattern-prompts.sh
- [ ] Test file is executable
  Verify: test -x tests/scripts/test-fix-bug-anti-pattern-prompts.sh
- [ ] Tests fail RED (prompt files do not exist)
  Verify: ! bash tests/scripts/test-fix-bug-anti-pattern-prompts.sh
